presentation.cue_derivation: minimal envelopes of nonidentical neutral/lens PCM samples merged across gaps no larger than 20 milliseconds and padded by 40 milliseconds, clamped to the file

per_pair.play_starts: counted separately for A and B

direction_prompts.enpt.aa_a: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the open vowel in Portuguese ‘pá’?
direction_prompts.enpt.ae_eh: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in English ‘bet’?
direction_prompts.enpt.ah_a: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the open vowel in Portuguese ‘pá’?
direction_prompts.enpt.goat_o: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in Portuguese ‘avô’?
direction_prompts.enpt.ih_i: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in English ‘see’?
direction_prompts.enpt.nurse_eh: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in English ‘bet’?
direction_prompts.enpt.reduced_i_i: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in English ‘see’?
direction_prompts.enpt.reduced_schwa_a: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the open vowel in Portuguese ‘pá’?
direction_prompts.enpt.uh_u: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in Portuguese ‘tu’?
direction_prompts.pten.ao_aa: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in American English ‘father’?
direction_prompts.pten.e_ih: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in English ‘bit’?
direction_prompts.pten.final_e_i: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in English ‘see’?
direction_prompts.pten.o_goat: Which side, if either, sounds closer to the vowel in English ‘go’?

interpretation.a_pass_can_establish: voice-bound rule-bound naturalness and perceptual direction across the three frozen unseen carriers for this informed reviewer
interpretation.a_pass_cannot_establish: Brazilian-Portuguese population perception, American-English population perception, arbitrary sentence generalization, multi-rule composition, consonants, nasality, or validated prosody
